summary: Vertical video. An Alien Registration Requirement how-to PSA ('Start the registration process') describing how to file Form G-325R online. Captioned voiceover narration plays over blurred silhouettes of people and a screen recording of the myUSCIS website sign-up page, framed by an ARR logo card and a URL card. There is no music track. On-screen and spoken text includes 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'Are you an alien in the United States', 'by creating an online account at', 'my USCIS', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; Are you an alien in the United States; by creating an online account at; my USCIS; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
